finding_results.notes: Roughened eight confession passages across lines 203-323. Twelve hours and Cliff's already...'). At line 247, Mallick must re-prompt with 'And then what.' because Tommy stalls mid-answer at the hold-down sequence and cannot deliver it in one pass. Physical specifics (shove, beam hit, water depth, shoe staging) are fully preserved. pass_summaries.summary: Expanded the chapter into a full-resolution sequence: Mallick's pre-dawn assembly of the case now makes the correction-grid payoff explicit, Tommy's confession now cleanly separates the shove from the later drowning choice, the aftermath gives the surviving men distinct consequence beats, and the closing casserole/draft-board images now land in continuity.

Single finding addressed: Tommy's confession dialogue roughened across eight passages to shift the dominant sub-mode from composed mini-narrative to pressure-fractured spoken recall. Six or more answer-turns now contain restarts, self-corrections, abandoned clauses, or shifted repetitions. One passage (the hold-down sequence) now requires a Mallick follow-up because Tommy cannot deliver it in one clean pass. All physical specifics, continuity details, and chapter structure preserved. Heading contract intact.
